findings.title: deepset-ai/haystack
findings.description: Open-source AI orchestration framework for building context-engineered, production-ready LLM applications. Design modular pipelines and agent workflows with explicit control over retrieval, routing, memory, and generation. Built for scalable agents, RAG, multimodal applications, semantic search, and conversational systems.

findings.title: neuml/txtai
findings.description: 💡 All-in-one AI framework for semantic search, LLM orchestration and language model workflows

findings.title: hangwin/mcp-chrome
findings.description: Chrome MCP Server is a Chrome extension-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes your Chrome browser functionality to AI assistants like Claude, enabling complex browser automation, content analysis, and semantic search.

findings.title: timescale/pgai
findings.description: A suite of tools to develop RAG, semantic search, and other AI applications more easily with PostgreSQL

findings.title: openrecall/openrecall
findings.description: OpenRecall is a fully open-source, privacy-first alternative to proprietary solutions like Microsoft's Windows Recall. With OpenRecall, you can easily access your digital history, enhancing your memory and productivity without compromising your privacy.

findings.title: freedmand/semantra
findings.description: Multi-tool for semantic search

findings.title: weggli-rs/weggli
findings.description: weggli is a fast and robust semantic search tool for C and C++ codebases. It is designed to help security researchers identify interesting functionality in large codebases.

findings.title: glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer
findings.description: AI chat assistant for Obsidian with contextual awareness, smart writing assistance, and one-click edits. Features vault-aware conversations, semantic search, and local model support.

findings.title: chn-lee-yumi/MaterialSearch
findings.description: Semantic search. Search local photos and videos through natural language. AI语义搜索本地素材。以图搜图、查找本地素材、根据文字描述匹配画面、视频帧搜索、根据画面描述搜索视频。

findings.title: run-llama/semtools
findings.description: Semantic search and document parsing tools for the command line

findings.title: ForLoopCodes/contextplus
findings.description: Semantic Intelligence for Large-Scale Engineering. Context+ is an MCP server designed for developers who demand 99% accuracy. By combining RAG, Tree-sitter AST, Spectral Clustering, and Obsidian-style linking, Context+ turns a massive codebase into a searchable, hierarchical feature graph.

findings.title: parruda/swarm
findings.description: Ruby gems for general-purpose AI agent systems: automation, research, data processing, customer support, content creation. SwarmSDK provides single-process orchestration, persistent memory with semantic   search, node workflows, and hooks. SwarmMemory/SwarmCLI included. Claude Swarm v1 for dev teams.

findings.title: BeaconBay/ck
findings.description: Local first semantic and hybrid BM25 grep / search tool for use by AI and humans!

findings.title: yoanbernabeu/grepai
findings.description: Semantic Search & Call Graphs for AI Agents (100% Local)

findings.title: kantord/SeaGOAT
findings.description: local-first semantic code search engine

findings.title: zanllp/infinite-image-browsing
findings.description: A full-featured image/video management app with AI-powered organization and semantic search. Supports metadata from  SD-webui, ComfyUI, Fooocus, NovelAI, StableSwarmUI, and more. Available as standalone app, SD-webui extension, or library.

findings.title: gnes-ai/gnes
findings.description: GNES is Generic Neural Elastic Search, a cloud-native semantic search system based on deep neural network.

findings.title: IliasHad/edit-mind
findings.description: Local-first AI video intelligence platform. Index your video library with multi-modal analysis (YOLO, DeepFace, Whisper), search semantically via natural language, Docker-ready.

findings.title: Open-Source-Legal/OpenContracts
findings.description: Humans and AI agents, building knowledge bases together. Self-hosted document annotation, version control, semantic search, and MCP.

findings.title: opensemanticsearch/open-semantic-search
findings.description: Open Source research tool to search, browse, analyze and explore large document collections by Semantic Search Engine and Open Source Text Mining & Text Analytics platform (Integrates ETL for document processing, OCR for images & PDF, named entity recognition for persons, organizations & locations, metadata management by thesaurus & ontologies, search user interface & search apps for fulltext search, faceted search & knowledge graph)
